findings.message: Layering violation: SessionLocal imported directly into routes layer. Routes should use dependency injection (get_session) for session management, not direct engine access.
findings.suggestion: Remove SessionLocal from the import. Use the SessionDep dependency injection pattern (already established with get_session on line 13) for all database access.

findings.message: Layering violation: Route handler opens its own database session (SessionLocal()) and performs ORM operations directly. This bypasses the repository layer abstraction and couples the route to database implementation details. A create_item repository function already exists for this purpose.
findings.suggestion: Inject a session via dependency (SessionDep) and delegate to the repository layer's create_item(session, name) function instead of directly manipulating ORM objects.
